Styling is parallel: a subtle top border or frame line, 16–24px of internal padding, and serif headings that visually link it to the rest of the About content. The mission content is likely of similar or slightly shorter height than the history, forming a balanced second panel in the vertical stack. The gap below this section mirrors the one above (24–32px) before the breeding philosophy section begins, keeping the rhythm of section spacing consistent.
component_layouts.spatial_behavior: Static block-level element within the main column, growing vertically with content but fixed in width and alignment.

component_layouts.layout_narrative: The breeding-philosophy-section continues the vertical sequence, positioned directly beneath the mission section with about 24–32px of separation. It again occupies roughly 90–95% of the main column, sharing the same left alignment and overall framing motif (thin teal border or rule, with 16–24px of padding). Because breeding philosophy can be text-heavy, this section may appear slightly taller than the mission block, but it remains visually compact through tight line spacing and modest paragraph spacing, preserving the medium-density feel of the active area. The bottom of this section sits 24–32px above the health-testing-section, maintaining the evenly stepped visual ladder down the page.
component_layouts.spatial_behavior: Behaves like the preceding sections—part of the natural flow, with flexible height but fixed position in the sequence.

component_layouts.layout_narrative: The health-testing-section is placed under the breeding philosophy block with a vertical gap of about 24–32px. It maintains the same width (about 90–95% of the main column) and left alignment, reinforcing the single, unified column of About content. Its visual treatment is in line with the other sections: a subtle ornamental touch (border or separator line) and 16–24px of internal padding around headings, lists, or paragraphs. Given its factual nature, this section might be broken into short paragraphs or bullet-like lines, but the text remains tightly grouped to avoid spreading too far down the page. A 24–32px space below separates it from the concluding show-achievements-section, ensuring each topic remains clearly delineated without feeling isolated.
component_layouts.spatial_behavior: Standard block-level section, expanding vertically based on content but remaining within the fixed-width main column.

component_layouts.layout_narrative: The show-achievements-section forms the last major content block in the main column, positioned 24–32px below the health-testing section. It follows the same structural pattern: 90–95% of the main column width, left-aligned with the other sections, with 16–24px of internal padding and a subtle top border or ornamental rule to match the gothic theme. This section may contain lists of titles, shows, or awards, likely resulting in a panel of moderate height. Crucially, this block is the final substantial content element before the CTAs and the large lower empty space. The space from its bottom to the CTA list is slightly tighter than the inter-section spacing—around 16–24px—to visually connect the accomplishments with the suggested next actions.
component_layouts.spatial_behavior: Final major block in the linear flow; its height varies but it always precedes the CTA list and the lower empty space.

component_layouts.layout_narrative: The about-cta-list is positioned directly beneath the show-achievements-section with a modest 16–24px vertical gap, acting as a compact footer-like strip for the About content. It consists of a small set of CTAs (e.g., Puppies, Stud Dogs, Upcoming Shows) arranged in a single horizontal row or a short stacked cluster, visually lighter than the section nav at the top. When arranged horizontally, the CTAs are centered within the main column, occupying about 40–50% of its width, with 8–12px gaps between each button or link. When stacked (on narrower widths), each CTA aligns to the left edge of the column but keeps tight vertical spacing (8–12px). The styling mirrors the gothic theme with teal accents but is slightly less ornate than the main header, indicating secondary importance. Below the CTA list, a substantial block of pure black space—at least 64px and often much more depending on viewport height—extends to the bottom of the page, recreating the mockup’s sense of a concentrated content cluster floating at the top with empty darkness below.
component_layouts.spatial_behavior: Static, end-of-flow element in the main column. It does not stick or float; instead it acts as the visual endpoint of the content, after which the user encounters primarily empty space.
